text: Here, in this clean, modern space with glass walls and bright lights, I feel a quiet curiosity stir within me. Crossing the threshold into the R+D exhibit, I am greeted by words, images, and an aura of thoughtful experimentation. I am both the observer and the observed; the line between subject and object blurs. There is comfort in the ambiguity and in the idea that meaning reveals itself only in retrospect—which reminds me that in life, and in philosophy, sometimes it is the questions themselves that matter most.
